Sign In About project Shop Consulting Calculator & Calendar BaZi Calculator Extended version of the Bazi calculator Chinese Calendar Personal calendar Qi Men Dun Jia Calculator Extended version Qi Men 24 Mountains Feng Shui Guide Updated: 01 January 1970 Navigator of Directions Navigator of successful travel Updated: 04 December 2025 Two-hour calculator Bazi Calculator (Calculate the Four Pillars of Destiny) BaZi Chart Compatibility BaZi Chart Загрузка… Bazi Calculator (Four Pillars of Destiny) - Features Bazi, or the four pillars of destiny, is a well-known technique for analyzing destiny and luck that allows one to tell a lot about a person's character, abilities, and life path. The basis for prediction is the energy birth chart – 8 hieroglyphs corresponding to the hour, day, month and year of a person's birth. Using our Bazi calculator, you can calculate Bazi chart in two versions - brief and for professional analysis. The calculator's appearance can be easily customized for your convenience - just enable or disable the parameters in the "show/hide" box. pages.contentSample: Bazi Calculator | FREE Bazi Chart Tool | Tap Your Success Directions - Bazi Calculator Menu 2026 Chinese Horoscope Forecast Bazi Calculator | FREE Bazi Chart Tool | Tap Your Success Directions Discover Your Inborn Talent-Free Bazi Profile Mobile App Bazi – Know Yourself And Succeed : FREE E-Book 1 Download Bazi Calculator Membership-FREE Bazi Calculator Free Report Sample Log In Bazi Calculator Membership-PRO Bazi Calculator Report (Sample) Membership Pro Log In Professional Log In About Janet Yung Personal Bazi Consultation Services Bazi Profile – Career Profiling Bookstore Shopping Feng Shui – Tap the energies  l  Bazi – Understand yourself to enhance your Success Affiliates Bazi Calculator There are two components in Bazi: Ming 命 Yun 运. Your Bazi chart tells you about your personality and your perception and relationship with others. This is one part of your Ming 命. Your luck improves when you begin to consciously reprogram your life using (choosing) better Experiences (better Luck). By understanding yourself (Ming 命) and what experiences you would likely encounter (Yun 运), you will better be able to: Understand luck cycles and ride the ‘good wave’ when it comes. Embark on and enjoy better luck cycles and gain better ‘experiences’ in life Become a person of greater influence thru understanding yourself Bazi not only defines your characteristics and intrinsic talent, it is also a destiny map of the opportunities and challenges that await you in life.  We don’t always get to
